title: Funny the eva things you find when you dont look
display_title: Funny the eva things you find when you dont look
wikitext:
[]: Funny the eva things you find when you dont look             Quote Post by Zeak » Fri May 09, 2008 9:39 pm found this wirh a random search in google to kill time. I got this site after searching for a rodney rude song http://blackjapanman.com/category/Japan/ Pachinko is a Japanese gaming machine used for pure amusement and also prizes. When you put 1000 yen (about 10 bucks) into the machine slot, a bunch of small metal balls will fill up your machine’s container. Then you turn the red knob on the bottom right clockwise in order to make the balls travel through the machine. Pachinko is kind of like pinball, except that you barely control anything. Most pachinko machines have themes and my favorite is the Evangelion pachinko. At first I had no interest in pachinko at all, but my friend told me about his pachinko experiences and how much fun he had, so I wanted to try it out. One day I went to this large pachinko spot in Suminoe-ku, Osaka which isn’t that far from Nanko. My on again off again girlfriend and I entered the pachinko parlor and I immediately noticed the Evangelion machine. My friend told me that the trick to pachinko is to come prepared with money that you don’t mind losing and to play for fun. So I spent about 20,000 yen and made back around 30,000 yen. Not bad for a rookie! If you come to Japan, you should try playing pachinko. You can get a feel for the real Japan in places like pachinko spots. People may smoke too much, bet too much money, and are really hardcore about their game, but the experience is worth it. Have you ever played pachinko? And if you so, how much money did you win? Funny because I have a walkthrough/cheats book for this

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri May 09, 2008 9:40 pm This is that thing that was advertised in the commercial that looked like it was going to be a live action film.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Fri May 09, 2008 9:56 pm there's an eva ps2 game, Hisshou Pachinko Series Vol. 1: CR Shinseiki Evangelion , where you play evangelion-themed pachinko. also, i'm pretty sure there's a similar title for the DS--maybe i'll look around for a rom.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri May 09, 2008 10:42 pm I have a book for the walkthrough for the game as well. It has a lot of non-pachinko related images, which I took a few pictures of and posted on THAT BOARD, including what looks like random character info. I also have a couple of promotional posters for the game that someone sent me a year or so ago.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri May 09, 2008 11:36 pm I actually played one of those Eva pachinko machines when I was in Japan. They're basically slot machines with more lights and video. For some reason Eva is a really popular Pachinko theme.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 10, 2008 1:52 pm Expanding on what Zimlord said, here are the Eva Pachinko titles I was able to find: For the DS: http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-9g-77-8-49-en-15-evangelion-70-2iqb-43-99.html ("I'll give the true love for you"?? Odd way to translate Magokoro Kimi ni! 'Least I think so.) http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-9g-77-5-49-en-15-evangelion-70-2q0b-43-99.html (At least "The Angels are back again" makes more sense....) And a PS2 Pachinko game: http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-46-77-3-49-en-15-evangelion-70-2izh-43-99.html Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat May 10, 2008 2:54 pm If I remember correctly, it is also the longest running pachinko machine 'series', and generating a lot of revenue. I wonder why (rhetoric hohoho)

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Wed May 14, 2008 1:50 am Lol next there will be an evangelion currency (not Yen)

[]:             Quote Post by Typhon » Tue May 27, 2008 11:18 pm lol, thatll be 3 shinjis and an Asuka. oh, you only have a Rei? then your change is 15 kajis

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue May 27, 2008 11:27 pm It probably shouldn't count, but I didn't know what hentai was until I started looking Eva up online. I was like "WTF"? I always thought before that nudity in anime was for theatrical purposes before until then.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 27, 2008 11:30 pm When I was in Japan, the Pachinko certainly caught my eye. I wanted to play them so badly! But I'm too young.
